CloudPostOffice is realtime messaging for apps, scripts, and AI agents. No MQTT broker setup or configuration, no infrastructure to manage. p1 = cpo.postbox('postbox-1', 'your-secret')
  p1.send(to='postbox-2', msg='hello')

  p2 = cpo.postbox('postbox-2', 'your-secret')
  p2.listen(lambda msg: prin
items.reason: CloudPostOffice is realtime messaging for apps, scripts, and AI agents，在 Hacker News 获得 2 分、1 条评论。

items.tool_name: Show HN: Live AI music sequencing agent
items.title: Show HN: Live AI music sequencing agent
items.summary: Pretzel is an experiment in live AI agents for music. It's a web synchronized music sequencer that is controlled by an AI agent. Everyone chats with the same AI agent and hears the same music at any time. I'm no audio engineer so it's a pretty basic tune, and turns out audio is a pretty complex 3d f
